Records.description: Massless three-loop seven-propagator form factor: two-loop crossed vertex with a one-loop insertion. Closed form with ${}_3F_2(1)$ and ${}_4F_3(1)$. Laurent expanded through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon)$. Leading pole $(\pi^2/12)/\varepsilon^3$. Called `A_{7,2}` in the paper.
Records.familyName: massless 3-loop 3-point form factor crossed with one-loop bubble insertion in two-loop vertex (7 propagators) / massless 3-loop 3-point form factor planar with one-loop bubble insertion in two-loop vertex (7 propagators)
Records.location: Section 3, Eqs. for A_{7,2} and J_6(alpha); Figure 1 (A_{7,2})

Records.description: Massless three-loop seven-propagator form factor: two-loop planar vertex with a one-loop insertion. Closed form with 4F3(1) and 5F4(1). Laurent expanded through O(eps). Leading pole 1/eps^5. Called `A_{7,1}` in the paper.
Records.familyName: massless 3-loop 3-point form factor planar with one-loop bubble insertion in two-loop vertex (7 propagators)
